name: ai-lie-detector-v2
description: AI Lie Detector with provenance-first backend, single and duel modes.

scripts.check:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const m=html.match(/<script>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/);if(!m) throw new Error('script missing'); new Function(m[1]); console.log('frontend JS syntax OK');"
